---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches configuration, sketch the `.ai-review.json`
shape; if it touches review behavior, note which reviewer/stage.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art, related issues.
